description: Style Note Cut a dash with these shoes for the cosmopolitan male from red tape. Inspired by the rugged Texas plains and the cowboy lifestyle from a bygone era, these leather shoes pay homage to the Wild West. Wear it with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish leather jacket. Product Details Black shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and stitched detailing A padded tongue and inner TPU outsole with an herringbone grooves Material and Care Leather Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
